name: Calgary
industries: Energy megaprojects and the transition portfolio dominate, with a growing downtown tech sector diversifying demand.
intro: Calgary's project culture was forged in the oil sands: megaproject delivery, joint-venture governance and formal stage gates are native skills here, and PMP is the credential that certifies them. The energy transition is now redirecting that muscle — carbon capture, hydrogen and renewables programs draw on the same certified talent — while a deliberate economic diversification push has built a genuine tech scene downtown. Live online batches run year-round with sensible Calgary timings — a full Saturday–Sunday weekend cohort plus a midweek Wednesday–Thursday option — so you train during comfortable local daytime hours; the schedule table below lists every upcoming date with its exact Calgary start and finish. The package stays identical: live weekend instruction, methodical exam application support, full-length mocks, and open trainer access until you pass.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Calgary?
faq.a: Live classes run 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM CT, which is 08:00 AM – 05:00 PM MDT in Calgary. You can pick a weekend (Sat–Sun) or a weekday (Wed–Thu) cohort; each completes the course over two consecutive days.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Calgary?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Calgary. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from Canada?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in Canada and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Calgary sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in Canada accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Calgary — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Calgary: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
